sourcesContent:
function Babysitting() { const babysitters = [ { name: "Mayada Mansour", nationality: "Lebanese", experience: "4 Years", service: "Babysitting", age: "24 Years Old", time: "Monday to Friday, 2 PM - 8 PM", contact: "MayadaMansour.baby@email.com", price: "$900 per month", image: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/4140/4140047.png", }, { name: "Ward Mohamad", nationality: "Syrian", experience: "5 Years", service: "Babysitting", age: "27 Years Old", time: "Saturday to Wednesday, 10 AM - 6 PM", contact: "Ward.baby@email.com", price: "$1100 per month", image: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/6997/6997662.png", }, { name: "Lina Khalil", nationality: "Lebanese", experience: "6 Years", service: "Babysitting", age: "29 Years Old", time: "Daily, 9 AM - 5 PM", contact: "lina.baby@email.com", price: "$1300 per month", image: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/4140/4140051.png", }, { name: "Nour Ali", nationality: "Palestinian", experience: "3 Years", service: "Babysitting", age: "22 Years Old", time: "Monday to Thursday, 5 PM - 11 PM", contact: "nour.baby@email.com", price: "$800 per month", image: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/4140/4140061.png", }, { name: "Yasmin Sabri", nationality: "Lebanese", experience: "8 Years", service: "Babysitting", age: "31 Years Old", time: "Friday to Sunday, 8 AM - 4 PM", contact: "Yasmin.baby@email.com", price: "$1500 per month", image: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/4140/4140037.png", }, { name: "Z", nationality: "Syrian", experience: "7 Years", service: "Babysitting", age: "30 Years Old", time: "Daily, Full Time", contact: "mariam.baby@email.com", price: "$1700 per month", image: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/4140/4140077.png", }, ]; function requestBabysitter(name) { alert("Your request has been sent to " + name); } return (

Babysitting Services

Find trusted babysitters to care for children and support families in a safe and friendly environment.

{babysitters.map((babysitter, index) => (

{babysitter.name}

Nationality: {babysitter.nationality}

Experience: {babysitter.experience}

Service: {babysitter.service}

Age: {babysitter.age}

Time: {babysitter.time}

Email: {babysitter.contact}

Salary: {babysitter.price}

))}
); } export default Babysitting;
